steps.title: Use the live-microbe clue
steps.content: The soil had been sterilized, so it initially lacked microbes. The researchers then added slurries of live microbes to the pots.

steps.title: Choose the filling meaning
steps.content: Choice A means clean or sterilize, which has already happened. Choice C means prevent, and Choice D means approximate a value. A verb meaning fill with living inhabitants matches adding microbes to sterile soil. The answer is B.
